en: To woo women Today we're going to be talking about William Shakespeare
Oh God I know A lot of you look forward to this about as much as you look forward to root canal work
We're going to talk about Shakespeare as someone who writes something very interesting Now many of you have seen Shakespeare done very
much like this Oh Titus bring your friend hither
But if any of you have seen Mr Marlon Brando No Shakespeare can be different France
ko: 하지만 마를론 브란도 씨를 본 적이 있다면

en: You can also imagine maybe John Wayne as Macbeth going Well is this a dagger I see before
Oh not just now I do enjoy a good dog once in a while sir
You can have yourself a three course meal from one dog Start with your canine crudités
Go to your five dog flambé for main course
